title: 5 Etsy Print Sizes That Fit the Frames Buyers Already Own
description: Ranked by IKEA Ribba, Target, and Michaels frame compatibility. #1: 8×10 (4:5 ratio). #2: 5×7. #3: 11×14. #4: 16×20 gallery wall anchor. #5: A4 for every EU, UK, and Australia buyer. SnapToSize ships all 5 sizes — plus 23 more — from a single artwork upload. 300 DPI. Under Etsy's 20MB cap.
